case_title: COLOMBINI, RUDY DBA PACIFIC EQUITIES vs. JACKSON, FERNAY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLOMBINI, RUDY DBA PACIFIC EQUITIES SERVED MAY-02-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURTON, JOE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLOMBINI, RUDY DBA PACIFIC EQUITIES COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-05-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 503 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, FERNAY BURTON, JOE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 828 DIVISADERO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $6,814.43 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,814.43, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS OF SUIT THROUGH A COST BILL. MONETARY PORTION OF THE JUDGMENT AS TO FERNAY JACKSON ONLY. JUDGMENT AGAINST BOTH OF THE DEFENDANTS FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLOMBINI, RUDY DBA PACIFIC EQUITIES AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, FERNAY BURTON, JOE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE WITNESSES S&E AND EXHIBITS ARE IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. BOTH SIDES SUMIT. THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.
